mission.title: fluent-bit: Kubernetes Filter - Add "Replace_Dots" function found in Elasticsearch Filter
mission.description: Kubernetes Filter - Add "Replace_Dots" function found in Elasticsearch Filter. Requested by 11+ users.

steps.title: Check current fluent-bit deployment
steps.description:
Verify your fluent-bit version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit
helm list -n fluent-bit 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working fluent-bit installation.

steps.title: Review fluent-bit configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant fluent-bit configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit
kubectl get configmap -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=fluent-bit
```
We currently have fluentbit tailing and parsing logs, but we subsequently pass these into fluentd for the benefit of buffering logs.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Kubernetes Filter - Add "Replace_Dots" function found in…
steps.description:
Apply the configuration change to resolve the issue:
```yaml
2019-08-29 08:03:47 +0000 [warn]: #0 dump an error event: error_class=Fluent::Plugin::ElasticsearchErrorHandler::ElasticsearchError error="400 - Rejected by Elasticsearch [error type]: mapper_parsing_exception [reason]: 'Could not dynamically add mapping for field [kubernetes_labels_app.kubernetes.io/instance]. Existing mapping for [kubernetes_labels_app] must be of type object but found [text].'" location=nil tag="kube.tag.log" time=2019-08-29 08:03:39.488097120 +0000 record={"log"=>" LOG"}
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit
kubectl get events -n fluent-bit --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Kubernetes Filter - Add "Replace_Dots" function found in…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: See the source issue for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/fluent/fluent-bit/issues/1538
codeSnippets: 2019-08-29 08:03:47 +0000 [warn]: #0 dump an error event: error_class=Fluent::Plugin::ElasticsearchErrorHandler::ElasticsearchError error="400 - Rejected by Elasticsearch [error type]: mapper_parsing_exception [reason]: 'Could not dynamically add mapping for field [kubernetes_labels_app.kubernetes.io/instance]. Existing mapping for [kubernetes_labels_app] must be of type object but found [text].'" location=nil tag="kube.tag.log" time=2019-08-29 08:03:39.488097120 +0000 record={"log"=>" LOG"}

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with fluent-bit installed or the issue environment reproducible.
